entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., including cultivars JG 315, ICC 4992, and ICC 10301

entities.name: ETHYL METHANE SULFONATE
entities.description: A chemical mutagen used for seed treatment to induce mutations

entities.name: VARIEGATED LEAF
entities.description: A mutation characterized by large single white lesions on the foliage blade and constriction at the leaflet margin

entities.name: APICAL CHLOROSIS
entities.description: A mutation where young foliage is yellow at the growing apex

entities.name: FOLIAR SPRAY OF FESO4
entities.description: Application of 0.5% iron sulfate to foliage to treat chlorosis

entities.name: IRON DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A nutritional deficiency that can cause chlorosis in plants

entities.name: RECESSIVE
entities.description: A type of inheritance where the trait is expressed only in homozygous individuals

entities.name: VAR GENE
entities.description: The gene controlling the variegated leaf trait

entities.name: ACH GENE
entities.description: The gene controlling the apical chlorosis trait

relationships.description: ruled out as the cause of
